signals.catalyst_text: ShinyHunters breach; 275M+ records claimed; school disruptions during finals
signals.notes: Largest education-sector breach in recent memory with active extortion campaign and defaced school portals; reputational/operational risk and cybersecurity spend scrutiny.

signals.catalyst_text: Devil Wears Prada 2 $433M global in 12 days via 20th Century Studios
signals.notes: Box-office revenue tailwind for studio segment; legacy-sequel economics validated.

signals.catalyst_text: Michael Jackson biopic $577M+ global gross; sequel discussions
signals.notes: Best-ever opening for a music biopic with 95% MJ catalog streaming surge; revenue upside and catalog/IP valuation lift.

signals.catalyst_text: Mortal Kombat II theatrical release May 8; Wuthering Heights streaming
signals.notes: Strong early box-office tracking validates video-game-to-film franchise pipeline.

signals.catalyst_text: Man on Fire, Lord of the Flies, Legends premieres; Remarkably Bright Creatures; Apex
signals.notes: Dense thriller/mystery premiere stack creating discovery loop and engagement density.

signals.catalyst_text: Widow's Bay on Apple TV+; Odyssey IMAX partnership
signals.notes: Streaming content investment with prestige tentpole adjacency.

signals.catalyst_text: Nolan's Odyssey (July 17); first feature shot entirely on IMAX cameras
signals.notes: Major tentpole release with IMAX-first marketing; theme park tie-in potential.

signals.catalyst_text: Backlash, UFC 328, Freedom 250 at White House June 14; premium live event stack
signals.notes: Sustained PPV/gate momentum with unusual White House venue story driving media rights narrative.

signals.catalyst_text: MV Hondius hantavirus outbreak; WHO alerts; multi-country evacuations
signals.notes: Cruise-sector sentiment overhang from novel Andes virus outbreak with documented person-to-person transmission.
Sector sentiment risk from MV Hondius outbreak and dramatic military airdrop visuals.
Sector sentiment risk from cruise-ship hantavirus narrative and public-health framing.

signals.catalyst_text: Canvas breach elevating cybersecurity spend narrative
signals.notes: Largest education-sector breach reinforces sector tailwind for enterprise cybersecurity spend.

signals.catalyst_text: Canvas/ShinyHunters breach driving cybersecurity spend narrative
signals.notes: Sector tailwind from headline-grade breach during active extortion campaign.
Equity near-zero following abrupt shutdown; likely delisted or untradeable.

signals.catalyst_text: Chrome +120% YoY, Search +63%, structured-data/cookie policy shifts
signals.notes: Platform attention surging on policy shifts; sustained query volume signal.

signals.catalyst_text: WhatsApp file/icon trending +752% YoY; platform comparison cooling
signals.notes: Engagement normalization post-outage cycle; mixed signals on user attention.

signals.catalyst_text: Jensen Huang +69% YoY in term report
signals.notes: Sustained leadership attention reinforcing AI narrative.

signals.catalyst_text: Larry Ellison +122% YoY in term report
signals.notes: Tech-leadership curiosity surge suggests sustained mindshare.

signals.catalyst_text: Jeff Bezos +157% YoY; Prime Video ACM Awards streaming
signals.notes: Leadership attention and content investment momentum.
